children.text: one member of the Board acting as chairman; and
2 members representing the public, appointed by the President on notification of the establishment of the special board of inquiry.

children.heading: .—Qualifications and Conflicts of Interest
children.label: b .—Qualifications and Conflicts of Interest
children.text: The public members of a special board of inquiry must be qualified by training and experience to participate in the inquiry and may not have a pecuniary interest in an aviation enterprise involved in the accident to be investigated.

children.heading: .—Authority
children.label: c .—Authority
children.text: A special board of inquiry has the same authority that the Board has under this chapter.
